info.title: EliteApply API
info.description: Platform API for the student application operating system.

get.description:
Deep readiness check: probes the DB, auth IdP, and SQS concurrently.

Returns 200 only when every critical dependency is reachable; otherwise 503 so
orchestrators/load balancers stop routing traffic to this instance.
Deprecated compatibility alias for /metrics. Scheduled for removal; point scrapers at /metrics.

schema.title: Response Get Academic Profile Api V1 Academic Profile Get
Response Academic Profile Versions Api V1 Academic Profile Versions Get

get.description:
Server-owned plan catalog. Only plans with a configured Stripe price id in this
environment are returned, so checkout can never be requested for an unavailable plan.

schema.title: Response List Plans Api V1 Billing Plans Get

get.description:
Current-month AI usage summary and a cursor-paginated log of individual
requests. Only the authenticated user's own usage is ever returned — the
admin-facing usage ledger is a separate, admin-gated surface.

get.description:
Admin-only usage ledger inspection — the ordinary-user `/billing/usage` endpoint
never accepts a target user id, so this is the only path that can see another
user's usage log rows (prompt.md §1.3: "Administrative usage details must not be
exposed to ordinary users").

Response Update Feature Flag Api V1 Admin Feature Flags  Key  Put
Response Launch Gates Api V1 Admin Launch Gates Get
Response Update Launch Gate Api V1 Admin Launch Gates  Key  Put

post.summary: Confirm email address with the verification code
Authenticate and receive browser-memory JWT tokens
Set a password for basic email/password login from an OAuth account

get.summary: Check if the authenticated user has a native email/password credential

post.summary: Refresh browser-memory access and ID tokens using the HttpOnly session cookie
Request a password reset code via email
Change password for an authenticated user

delete.summary: Permanently delete user account (requires email verification code)

get.summary: Export all of the user's personal data as a JSON download (GDPR Art. 20)

post.summary: Record acceptance of the current Terms/Privacy version and marketing preference
Request account deletion — sends a one-time confirmation code by email

put.summary: Upload a file to local storage via a signed token

schema.title: Response Upload File Api V1 Storage Upload Put

get.summary: Download a file from local storage via a signed token

AcademicReferenceUpdate.title: AcademicReferenceUpdate
AcademicReferenceUpdate.description: Only permitted while the invitation is still `invited` (nothing submitted yet).

CheckoutRequest.title: CheckoutRequest
CheckoutRequest.description:
`plan_key` must be one of app.core.plans.plan_catalog()'s keys — never a raw
Stripe price id from the client.

code.title: Code
code.description: One-time deletion confirmation code sent by email

consent.title: Consent
consent.description: Must be true — recording/transcription requires explicit consent.

OperationDetail.title: OperationDetail
OperationDetail.description:
Deliberately excludes `request_payload`/`raw_source_text`/similar content
columns — an admin operations view is for lifecycle triage, not content
inspection (prompt.md §5.7: no essay/reference/interview content in
admin-facing surfaces any more than in logs).

SavedSearchFilters.title: SavedSearchFilters
SavedSearchFilters.description:
A validated, bounded filter set mirroring the existing catalogue list
endpoints' query parameters — never an arbitrary query expression. Fields not
applicable to `entity_type` are simply ignored when the search runs.
